description: with no negotiation floor the cost floor stands
assertions: price_floor is 650.00 with bound cost_floor (tool golden)
the output says the negotiation posture is unset and points at the playbook pricing_and_rates family

description: a higher rate-card floor overrides the cost floor
assertions: the rate floor's provenance (rate card or playbook) is named
the consequential-action gate precedes any external quote

description: a floor outside the benchmark range raises the right flag
assertions: exactly one flag: the floor exceeds the benchmark high
the flag advises expect-pushback-or-justify-scope; it never lowers the floor
the benchmark caveat (verify before quoting) stays attached
price_floor is null with a gap saying to run cost-estimate first
null-valued benchmark rows are never used as a range
nothing is priced from thin air
